story.iWant: a project creation dialog with fields for name, description, type (Personal/Shared), color (from Moku Web palette), and icon
story.soThat: I can create new projects with consistent branding and visual organization
story.tasks: - Implement Dialog UI and Form (modal dialog with name, description, type, color, icon fields) - Implement Project Type Selector (Personal/Shared radio buttons with help text) - Implement Moku Web Color Picker (12 predefined colors, no custom hex input) - Implement Icon Selector (Moku Web icon set, grid/list view) - Implement Client-Side Validation (name 1-100 chars, type required, color from palette) - Implement Project Creation Flow (call ProjectService.create, show loading, navigate on success) - Verify Database Foreign Key (ON DELETE CASCADE for project_id in desktop_threads) - Performance and Testing (creation <2s P95, E2E tests, error handling)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Form fields: name (required, 1-100 chars), description (optional), type selector (Personal/Shared, required), color (predefined Moku Web palette - 12 colors), icon (selector)
Type selector defaults to "Personal" with help text explaining the difference
Color picker shows ONLY predefined palette (no custom hex input)
Client-side validation prevents submission with invalid data (name length, color from palette, type selection)
"Create" button calls ProjectService.create() with type and shows loading state
Success: dialog closes, navigates to new project
Failure: error message shown, user can retry
Database foreign key created with ON DELETE CASCADE for project_id

doc.section: 1. User clicks "New Project" button in sidebar 2. ProjectCreationDialog opens with form fields 3. User fills: name (required), description (optional), type (Personal/Shared, defaults to Personal), color (from Moku Web palette - 12 colors), icon (selector) 4. Client-side validation: name 1-100 chars, no special chars, type selected, color from predefined palette 5. User clicks "Create" 6. ProjectService.create() calls Moku API POST /api/projects 7. API returns new project with generated ID and type field 8. API creates foreign key with ON DELETE CASCADE for project_id 9. ProjectService adds to cache with 5-minute TTL 10. UI navigates to new project detail view
Personal Project: Single-member, only owner can access, can be upgraded to shared later Shared Project: Multi-member, team collaboration, can add/remove members

Name: Required, 1-100 characters, alphanumeric + spaces + hyphens (regex: ^[a-zA-Z0-9\s\-]+$) Description: Optional, max 500 characters Color: Must be one of MOKU_PROJECT_COLORS (exact hex match) Icon: Must be valid icon identifier from Moku Web icon set

code.file: May exist - project form modal component Will add type selector and Moku Web color picker
Project creation panel component Will integrate with ProjectCreationDialog
ProjectService.createProject(title, description, type, color, icon) IPC call to backend
IPC handler for project:create Validates inputs, creates project, broadcasts event

constraints.constraint: Moku Web color palette (12 predefined colors, no custom hex input)
Project type selector: Personal (default) or Shared
Name: 1-100 chars, alphanumeric + spaces + hyphens only
ON DELETE CASCADE foreign key for project_id in desktop_threads

interface.name: CreateProjectRequest
interface.field: Icon identifier from Moku Web icon set

method.name: projects:create
method.signature: ipcRenderer.invoke('projects:create', { name, description, type, color, icon }): Promise<Project>

tests.standards: - Unit tests: Form validation (name, color from palette, type selection, icon) - E2E tests: Full creation flow (open dialog → fill form → submit → navigate) - E2E tests: Error handling (API failure, retry flow) - Manual tests: Color picker UI (verify 12 colors, no custom hex), icon selector UX - Integration tests: Verify ON DELETE CASCADE foreign key (create → delete → verify threads deleted)

ideas.idea: Test dialog opens when "New Project" button clicked in sidebar
Test form has all required fields: name, description, type, color, icon
Test type selector defaults to "Personal" with help text
Test color picker shows only 12 Moku Web colors, no custom hex input
Test validation: empty name fails, name >100 chars fails, invalid color fails
Test "Create" button calls ProjectService.create() with type field
Test success: dialog closes, navigates to /projects/{newProjectId}
Test failure: API error shown, dialog stays open, user can retry
Integration test: create project → delete → verify CASCADE deleted threads
